case_title: DEREK LEHRMAN VS. PERCY GREEN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,796.20 FILED BY LEHRMAN, DEREK AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PERCY GREEN, ALBERTINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GREEN, PERCY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
CASE DISMISSED AS TO ALBERTINE GREEN BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUN-30-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PERCY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $35.00 SERVED JUN-30-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, ALBERTINE
ORDER ON DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL [X]GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEHRMAN, DEREK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, PERCY $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.12 INTEREST, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $886.12, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ALBERTINE GREEN IS DISMISSED AS SHE IS DECEASED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PERCY GREEN WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERTINE GREEN WAS NOT PRESENT AND IS REPORTED DECEASED BY PERCY GREEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
